info.name: Cando Base Data
info.description:
Base Data Microservice API Collection  
This collection provides access to Cando's shared data like Work Types, Cities, Genders, and more.  
Features:  
No Authentication: Open APIs for seamless integration.  
Easy to Use: Import, explore, and test directly in Postman.

Perfect for quick integration and testing. Let us know if you need any help
